packs.name: Minecraft Super Cute Texture Pack
packs.description: The Super Cute Texture Pack lets you create a cheerful world full of the cutest and cuddliest mobs! Bouncing bunnies, ultra-adorable unicorns, brilliant bumblebees and, er, burgers? Yes, burgers! Even the squid will make you Squeee! This pack adds super cute textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI.

packs.name: Minecraft City Texture Pack
packs.description: Free your inner architect and shape the world around you.This pack adds a creative texture set, ideal for building structures. Includes unique textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI.

packs.name: Minecraft Plastic Texture Pack
packs.description: Make your worlds simple, colorful and vibrant! This brightly colored and simple pack adds plastic-themed textures for blocks, items, and entities, along with a completely transformed UI.

packs.name: Natural Texture Pack
packs.description: Give your worlds a more natural look. A texture pack based on soft colors and lines.This pack includes detailed textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI that give a refined feel without straying too far from the vanilla game.

packs.name: Minecraft Fantasy Texture Pack
packs.description: Transport yourselves to a time where knights were heroes. This pack adds a medieval, fantasy look for blocks, items, entities, and UI.

packs.name: Minecraft Candy Texture Pack
packs.description: Indulge your sweet tooth with this sugar-coated texture pack! This sweet pack adds tantalizing textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI

packs.name: Minecraft Cartoon Texture Pack
packs.description: Googly eyes! Goofy grins! Turn your world into a toon with this pack. This pack adds themed textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI.

packs.name: Minecraft: Steampunk Texture Pack
packs.description: Create your own Industrial Revolution with this Victorian inspired Steampunk texture pack! This pack adds steampunk-themed textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI.

packs.name: Minecraft: Pattern Texture Pack
packs.description: Decorate your world with this bright and colorful texture pack filled with beautiful patterns and knitted animals! This pack adds themed textures for blocks, items, entities, and UI.
